summary:
• Iraq's oil export collapse forcing reliance on risky overland routes represents a critical supply disruption risk for Western Hemisphere markets dependent on Middle Eastern crude flows.

• Iran's persistent covert oil trade despite U.S. blockade and the expiring truce creates uncertainty around sanctions enforcement and potential supply shocks if negotiations fail.

• Norway's depletion of spare output capacity eliminates a key global supply buffer, heightening vulnerability to unexpected disruptions in other major producing regions.

articles.description: GasEntec and its affiliates have signed agreements with ELTON Logistics & Services to supply a jetty-based LNG regasification unit (JRU) and related onshore equipment for the Dakar LNG terminal in Senegal.
